title: Neural Entrainment Technology for Cognitive Prosthetics

body.text: This paper examines neural entrainment technologies as non-invasive cognitive prosthetics, focusing on auditory-visual stimulation techniques that can enhance cognitive function, reduce anxiety, and improve focus for neurodivergent individuals.

Neural entrainment uses rhythmic sensory stimuli to synchronize brain oscillations to desired frequencies, offering potential benefits for attention, memory, and emotional regulation without pharmaceutical intervention.
Auditory entrainment: binaural beats, isochronic tones
Visual entrainment: flicker light, pattern reversal
P31 Labs explores integrating safe, user-controlled neural entrainment features into artifacts like Node Zero to provide on-demand cognitive state regulation.
